title: Senior Financial Analyst - Motilal Oswal - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Motilal Oswal - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Motilal Oswal in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Motilal Oswal:
Motilal Oswal is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Motilal Oswal!
